CAMPAIGN CONTEXT: Shard C is civilization's nervous system — whoever controls these waters controls trade routes, naval projection, and political communication across the known world. The danger here is not feral or corrupted; it is institutional, factional, and human. Power in Shard C is brokered through competing interests — merchants, naval authority, and shard-aligned political figures all with overlapping and contradictory agendas. The party arrives with no established contacts and no named objective, meaning first interactions at the port hub will likely surface the central conflict of this shard. Vargr's ability to channel spirits may prove as valuable as any sword here — old power in these waters has memory, and governance leaves ghosts.
